title: Who owned it, and when
subtitle: Five years of beneficial ownership changes for notable UK companies, reconstructed from Companies House PSC data and mapped to the Beneficial Ownership Data Standard (BODS v0.4).

companies.name: Chelsea FC Holdings Limited
companies.hook: A sanctions-forced sale, and a holding company that existed for six weeks

stats.comparison: Reaching the ultimate owner means walking 3 layer(s) up the chain through 7 companies — each its own PSC page and filing history on Companies House. Here it is one timeline.

companies.name: Newcastle United Limited
companies.hook: From Mike Ashley to a Saudi sovereign-wealth consortium — and an early gap in the record

stats.comparison: Reaching the ultimate owner means walking 2 layer(s) up the chain through 5 companies — each its own PSC page and filing history on Companies House. Here it is one timeline.

companies.name: Everton Football Club Company, Limited
companies.hook: A named individual owner, resident offshore, replaced after eight years

stats.comparison: Reaching the ultimate owner means walking 1 layer(s) up the chain through 2 companies — each its own PSC page and filing history on Companies House. Here it is one timeline.

companies.name: Kemble Water Holdings Limited
companies.hook: The anti-timeline: the ultimate UK parent of Thames Water reports no owner at all

stats.comparison: Reaching the ultimate owner means walking 0 layer(s) up the chain through 1 company — each its own PSC page and filing history on Companies House. Here it is one timeline.
